title: justicia dives var. ovatula
intro: Justicia dives var. ovatula, also known as the 'Water-willow', is a plant species belonging to the Acanthaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Justicia dives var. ovatula include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic to help manage urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of this plant may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health complaints.
